item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: BitMEX recorded $84M in BTC futures volume yesterday, representing 0.08% of the market. It was a great exchange that helped shape the industry, and now it is passing the torch to the next generation o
item.description: pBitMEX recorded $84M in BTC futures volume yesterday, representing 0.08% of the market.br /br /It was a great exchange that helped shape the industry, and now it is passing the torch to the next generation of exchanges it inspired./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN5s5MIbwAAh6I9.jpg" /hr /

item.title: RT by @nono2357: 🚨 BitMEX, l'une des premières plateformes de dérivés crypto, va fermer définitivement le 23 septembre. ➡️ Fondée en 2014 par Arthur Hayes, la plateforme avait popularisé les contrats
item.description: p🚨 BitMEX, l'une des premières plateformes de dérivés crypto, va fermer définitivement le 23 septembre.br /br /➡️ Fondée en 2014 par Arthur Hayes, la plateforme avait popularisé les contrats perpétuels./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN5ep1GXYAAxheK.jpg" /

item.title: Breaking: Arthur Hayes-Founded BitMEX, Pioneer of Crypto Perpetuals, to Shut Down BitMEX said it will permanently close its exchange at 04:00 UTC on September 23 and has stopped accepting new user reg
item.description: pBreaking: Arthur Hayes-Founded BitMEX, Pioneer of Crypto Perpetuals, to Shut Downbr /br /BitMEX said it will permanently close its exchange at 04:00 UTC on September 23 and has stopped accepting new user registrations. Co-founded by Arthur Hayes in 2014, BitMEX introduced the crypto industry’s firs

item.description: pTHE VALUE OF TOKENIZED EQUITY ON SOLANA SURPASSED $500 MILLION, SETTING A NEW RECORD .../p

item.title: Bitcoin spot demand is weakening. Futures demand remains net positive, but is significantly lower than during the rebound three months ago.
item.description: pBitcoin spot demand is weakening. Futures demand remains net positive, but is significantly lower than during the rebound three months ago./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FHN5RZgbbUAAQwLY.jpg" /

item.title: Verus–Ethereum Bridge Suffers Second Exploit in Two Months, $7.54M Drained Blockaid detected a new exploit targeting the Verus–Ethereum Bridge, with an attacker abusing the bridge’s import path to tri
item.description: pVerus–Ethereum Bridge Suffers Second Exploit in Two Months, $7.54M Drainedbr /br /Blockaid detected a new exploit targeting the Verus–Ethereum Bridge, with an attacker abusing the bridge’s import path to trigger unbacked Ethereum-side payouts and drain approximately $7.54 million in ETH, tBTC, USDC

item.title: Is today Hackers' Day? Three exploits have already happened today, with total losses of $35.55M. AFX Trade(@AFX_XYZ) was exploited for $24.15M. Verus(@VerusCoin) Ethereum bridge was exploited for $7.5
item.description: pIs today Hackers' Day?br /br /Three exploits have already happened today, with total losses of $35.55M.br /br /AFX Trade(a href="https://nitter.net/AFX_XYZ" title="AFX Trade"@AFX_XYZ/a) was exploited for $24.15M.br /br /Verus(a href="https://nitter.net/VerusCoin" title="Verus - The Internet of Valu

item.title: It appears the @VerusCoin Ethereum bridge was exploited for $7.55M. The exploiter swapped all the stolen funds for 3,916 $ETH($7.52M) and deposited them into #TornadoCash for laundering. https://arkm.
item.description: pIt appears the a href="https://nitter.net/VerusCoin" title="Verus - The Internet of Value"@VerusCoin/a Ethereum bridge was exploited for $7.55M.br /br /The exploiter swapped all the stolen funds for 3,916 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23ETH"$ETH/a($7.52M) and deposited them into

item.title: RT by @SantimentData: 💸 Bitcoin ETFs have now logged 7 straight trading days of inflows since July 14th, with Santiment tracking $981.2M net moving back in as $BTC pushed as high as $66.3K. After the
item.description: p💸 Bitcoin ETFs have now logged 7 straight trading days of inflows since July 14th, with Santiment tracking $981.2M net moving back in as a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23BTC"$BTC/a pushed as high as $66.3K. After the heavy May and June outflow stretch, steady positive days are an

item.title: According to SoSoValue, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of USD 68.99 million on July 23, led by BlackRock’s IBIT with USD 38.78 million. Spot Ethereum ETFs drew USD 72.64 million, wi
item.description: pAccording to SoSoValue, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of USD 68.99 million on July 23, led by BlackRock’s IBIT with USD 38.78 million. Spot Ethereum ETFs drew USD 72.64 million, with BlackRock’s ETHA posting the largest single-day inflow at USD 53.47 million. BlackRock is the wo

item.title: Upbit, South Korea’s largest crypto exchange by trading volume, will list o1 exchange (O) at 15:00 KST on July 23, opening KRW, BTC and USDT trading pairs. o1 exchange is a Base-based onchain trading
item.description: pUpbit, South Korea’s largest crypto exchange by trading volume, will list o1 exchange (O) at 15:00 KST on July 23, opening KRW, BTC and USDT trading pairs. o1 exchange is a Base-based onchain trading platform offering spot execution, multi-venue routing and professional trading-terminal tools, with

item.title: It appears @BSquaredNetwork was exploited, with 8.59M $B2 ($3.86M) stolen. The exploiter sold all 8.59M $B2 for 5,409 $BNB ($3.01M). The funds were then bridged to #Ethereum, swapped for $ETH and $USD
item.description: pIt appears a href="https://nitter.net/BSquaredNetwork" title="B² Network | Scaling Bitcoin"@BSquaredNetwork/a was exploited, with 8.59M $B2 ($3.86M) stolen.br /br /The exploiter sold all 8.59M $B2 for 5,409 a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23BNB"$BNB/a ($3.01M).br /br /The funds we

item.title: Grayscale: Bitcoin Bear Market Could Last Until September or October Grayscale said Bitcoin’s current bear market could continue until September or October if the traditional four-year cycle holds, as
item.description: pGrayscale: Bitcoin Bear Market Could Last Until September or Octoberbr /br /Grayscale said Bitcoin’s current bear market could continue until September or October if the traditional four-year cycle holds, as previous downturns typically bottomed about a year after the market peak and produced avera

item.title: Attacker Drains $24M in USDC From AFX Bridge on Arbitrum
item.description: The exploit targeted a bridge operated by derivatives exchange AFX and emptied nearly all of the USDC locked in the contract, according to security firm Blockaid. Arbitrum co-founder Steven Goldfeder said the network's native bridge was not affected.

item.title: Japan Could Launch Its First Bitcoin ETF as Early as 2028 Japan could introduce its first Bitcoin exchange-traded fund as early as 2028, as the Financial Services Agency prepares to revise investment-
item.description: pJapan Could Launch Its First Bitcoin ETF as Early as 2028br /br /Japan could introduce its first Bitcoin exchange-traded fund as early as 2028, as the Financial Services Agency prepares to revise investment-fund rules following legislation that brings crypto assets under the Financial Instruments a

item.title: AFX Trade(@AFX_XYZ) was exploited for $24.15M! The exploiter bridged 24.15M $USDC to #Ethereum and bought 12,467 $ETH at an average price of $1,937. https://arkm.com/explorer/address/0x2f2974fAbc54dbA
item.description: pAFX Trade(a href="https://nitter.net/AFX_XYZ" title="AFX Trade"@AFX_XYZ/a) was exploited for $24.15M!br /br /The exploiter bridged 24.15M a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23USDC"$USDC/a to a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23Ethereum"#Ethereum/a and bought 12,467 a

item.title: Before you swap or bridge in @heyaura, users can now see whether Hypernative has screened the token and what we recommend. It's delivered through @lifiprotocol's infrastructure, the same real-time scr
item.description: pBefore you swap or bridge in a href="https://nitter.net/heyaura" title="heyAura"@heyaura/a, users can now see whether Hypernative has screened the token and what we recommend. br /br /It's delivered through a href="https://nitter.net/lifiprotocol" title="LI.FI"@lifiprotocol/a's infrastructure, the

item.title: Crypto Industry Pushes for Senate Vote on New CLARITY Act Text as Democrats Blast Ethics Plan
item.description: Coinbase, the Blockchain Association and the DeFi Education Fund urged the Senate to pass the 616-page merged draft, while Sen. Angela Alsobrooks called its DOJ-led ethics enforcement "wild and unserious and stone-cold crazy."

item.title: RT by @ylecun: Pretrained ViTs see the world in rich, dense detail. Most policies pool it to a single vector before acting, discarding most of it. We introduce Patch Policy: a minimal architectural ex
item.description: pPretrained ViTs see the world in rich, dense detail. Most policies pool it to a single vector before acting, discarding most of it.br /br /We introduce Patch Policy: a minimal architectural extension that enables transformer-based policies to consume dense tokens directly, no billion-param VLM requ

item.title: Tokenized Stocks Hit Records Across Every Major Venue as Sector Reaches $2.3B
item.description: Ondo, Backed Finance, and Robinhood Chain all set all-time highs in tokenized equity holdings this week, while dYdX's new Arcus exchange posted record perps volume — signs the market for onchain stocks is scaling on multiple fronts at once.

item.title: Robinhood Chain Overtakes Base on Daily Active Users Three Weeks After Launch
item.description: The Arbitrum Orbit network posted 324,000 daily active users and a record $588.9 million in TVL on July 21, edging out Coinbase's L2 on activity — though memecoins, not the tokenized stocks it was built for, are driving most of the volume.

item.title: Ostium to Reopen Trading July 23 After $23.8M Vault Exploit
item.description: Positions will be marked to the live market price at reopen, and new OLP liquidity-provider deposits stay paused as the protocol works through recovery.

item.title: Senate Republicans Release Updated CLARITY Act Text, Ethics Rules Spark Bipartisan Dispute According to crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett, Senate Republicans released an updated CLARITY Act text, with
item.description: pSenate Republicans Release Updated CLARITY Act Text, Ethics Rules Spark Bipartisan Disputebr /br /According to crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett, Senate Republicans released an updated CLARITY Act text, with the ethics package becoming the main point of dispute. The proposal would bar the president
